title: iteaceae
intro: Iteaceae is a family of flowering plants, characterized by their small, often yellow or white flowers and typically woody or shrub-like growth habit. This family is native to the Northern Hemisphere, with species found in North America, Europe, and Asia. Iteaceae includes about 8-10 genera, such as Itea and Parnassia, which are often found in woodland or rocky areas. The family is relatively small and diverse, with species exhibiting a range of adaptations to their environments.
